name: GitHub
description: Interact with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, commits, and users via the GitHub REST API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## GitHub REST API

Connect to GitHub to manage repositories, issues, pull requests, commits, and users programmatically.

### Features
- Browse and search repositories
- Manage issues and comments
- View pull requests and commits
- Look up user profiles
- List releases and repository contents

### Authentication
Requires a GitHub personal access token with appropriate scopes.

Authorization.description: GitHub personal access token (Environment variable: GITHUB_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get Repository
tools.description: Get details about a specific GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

response.description: Repository details including name, description, stars, forks, and more.

tools.name: List Repository Issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository with optional filters.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

state.description: Filter issues by state. Can be 'open', 'closed', or 'all'.

labels.description: Comma-separated list of label names to filter by.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of issues with title, body, state, labels, and author details.

tools.name: Create Issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

body.description: The body content of the issue (markdown supported).

labels.description: List of label names to assign to the issue.

assignees.description: List of GitHub usernames to assign to the issue.

response.description: The created issue with its number, URL, and full details.

tools.name: List Pull Requests
tools.description: List pull requests in a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

state.description: Filter pull requests by state: 'open', 'closed', or 'all'.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of pull requests with title, state, author, and branch details.

tools.name: Get Pull Request
tools.description: Get details about a specific pull request in a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

pull_number.description: The number of the pull request.

response.description: Pull request details including title, body, state, diff stats, and review information.

tools.name: List Repository Commits
tools.description: List commits for a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

sha.description: SHA or branch name to start listing commits from.

author.description: GitHub login or email to filter commits by author.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of commits with SHA, author, message, and timestamp.

tools.name: Get User
tools.description: Get a GitHub user's public profile information.

username.description: The GitHub username to look up.

response.description: User profile with login, name, bio, followers, public repos, and more.

tools.name: Search Repositories
tools.description: Search GitHub repositories using the GitHub search syntax.

q.description: The search query. Supports GitHub search qualifiers like 'language:python stars:>100'.

response.description: Search results with total count and list of matching repositories.

tools.name: List User Repositories
tools.description: List public repositories for a GitHub user.

response.description: List of repositories owned by the user.

tools.name: Create Issue Comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing issue in a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

issue_number.description: The number of the issue to comment on.

body.description: The body text of the comment (markdown supported).

response.description: The created comment with its ID, URL, and author details.

tools.name: List Repository Releases
tools.description: List releases for a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: List of releases with tag name, name, body, and asset details.

tools.name: Get Repository Contents
tools.description: Get the contents of a file or directory in a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

path.description: The file path within the repository.

ref.description: The name of the commit, branch, or tag to retrieve contents from.

response.description: File or directory contents, with base64-encoded content for files.
